title: Enum member name treated as wire in port binding

features.name: enum member name in module port connection expression
features.description: Code should include an enum member name used directly inside a port-connection expression (e.g., a comparison) when instantiating a submodule, so that the enum member must be resolved as a constant rather than as an implicit net

features.name: enum case statement with member name labels
features.description: Code should include a case statement whose selector is an enum-typed variable and whose case items are enum member names, exercising enum member name resolution as case labels

features.name: sequential always block with dual-edge sensitivity and enum state variable
features.description: Code should include a clocked always block with both posedge clock and negedge reset in the sensitivity list, performing non-blocking assignments to an enum-typed state variable using enum member names
